headline: Comcast Trades at Just 8 Times Earnings After Losing 711,000 Broadband Subs Last Year
summary: A strategic shift and a spin-off haven't been enough to tempt investors despite its 4.7% dividend yield.

headline: Xfinity Kicks Off Member Celebration with Three Weeks of Exclusive Entertainment, Sports, Live Experiences and Savings from Comcast NBCUniversal
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 20, 2026--Comcast’s Xfinity today launched its Xfinity Member Celebration, a limited-time event running through May 10 that delivers three weeks of bonus benefits, sweepstakes, and exclusive experiences for Xfinity members. Members can also unlock special Xfinity product offers, featuring savings on mobile devices, smartwatches, and smart home technology, with even more value available at higher membership tiers.
